name: Greek Potato Breakfast Skillet
method: Prepare the potato as per the box instructions, stirring the spice
package with two tablespoons of olive oil.
Over moderate flame, heat a large sauté pan.
Stir in the potatoes, then simmer for two minutes.
Mix in the tomatoes and simmer until the potatoes begin to yellow
and the tomatoes begin to peel, stirring periodically.
To one bottom of the plate, move the tomatoes and potatoes and add
the remaining two teaspoons' olive oil.
Transfer the cloves and spinach to the olive oil.
Cook for about two minutes, stirring continuously until the spinach is
Free from the heat. Mix in the pine nuts, coriander, and feta.
Cook the eggs, crispy side up, in a small nonstick pan while the
potatoes and tomato combination is frying.
Divide the mixture of potatoes into four plates.
Cover with a fried egg for each meal.
